title: Anthropic and Trump officials meet to discuss Mythos access
description: The White House said opportunities for collaboration and for addressing the challenges from artificial intelligence were discussed.
content:
The White House said a meeting Friday with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei was "productive and constructive” as U.S. President Donald Trump's administration seeks wider access to the company’s powerful new Mythos artificial intelligence model.

description: China’s central bank governor Pan Gongsheng said artificial intelligence is driving a new wave of technological and industrial transformation that brings both opportunities and risks to the global economy.

title: Meta plans to slash roughly 8,000 jobs next month: report
description: Meta is reportedly planning to lay off nearly 8,000 employees on May 20, according to sources, as the tech giant seeks to offset rising artificial intelligence infrastructure costs.
content:
Meta is preparing to cut thousands of jobs as early as next month, with deeper layoffs expected later this year, according to a report.
The tech giant intends to slash roughly 10% of its global workforce — or nearly 8,000 employees — in an initial ro... [1935 chars]
